data.title: Google's Veo Video Generator Arrives On Cloud: How Oreo Maker Mondelez Is Using AI For Creative Content
data.description: Google has introduced its Veo video generator on its Cloud platform, enabling companies like Quora and Mondelez to create AI-driven content, while competing with other tech giants in the rapidly growing AI video generation market.

data.title: Sony-Honda EV Dream Collides With Trump-Backed Policy Shift Reality Ahead Of 2026 US Launch
data.description: Sony Group and Honda Motor's joint electric vehicle venture faces significant headwinds as it prepares to enter the U.S. market in 2026, amid expected policy changes under President-elect Donald Trump that could reshape the EV landscape.

data.title: XRP Becomes Third-Most Valued Crypto — Beats Boeing, Nike In Market Capitalization

data.title: Trump's DEA Pick Withdraws From Consideration, Will Keep Job As Florida Sheriff
data.description: Trump's DEA nominee, Florida sheriff Chad Chronister, has withdrawn from consideration after backlash. His office faced criticism over immigration policies.

data.title: Bill Ackman Says Biden Is Handcuffing Trump And Musk's DOGE Plans By Locking In Work-From-Home Deals For Federal Employees: 'This Needs To Stop Now'
data.description: On Tuesday, Pershing Square Capital Management CEO Bill Ackman slammed what he said were attempts by the Biden administration to “make permanent the Deep State” in a post on X.
